title: symphyotrichum × finkii
intro: Symphyotrichum × finkii, also known as Fink's Aster or Fink's Symphyotrichum, is a rare hybrid plant species belonging to the family Asteraceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and exhibiting antimicrobial activity. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, although its use is largely limited to research and experimentation due to its rarity.
